global_price_list_subtitle: Manage product prices for all shops at once
global_price_schedule_help_body: Here you see the currently effective prices and scheduled (future) changes. Add a new entry using the modal. Saving a price applies to ALL shops simultaneously. Existing records cannot be edited – future ones can be removed (deletion affects all shops).
price_schedule_table_hint: Current price + future changes – for all shops
search_hint: Search by product name or SKU
global_price_modal_hint: Note: saving this price will create an identical entry for ALL shops in the system. Select a product, set the effective date and enter the net or gross price.
missing_prices_body: Some products have no currently effective price. Fill them in to avoid pricing errors.
price_required: Enter a price greater than zero.
valid_from_must_be_future: The 'Valid From' date must be in the future.
delete_future_price_confirm: Delete this scheduled price from all shops?
delete_only_future: Deletion is only possible for prices with a future date.
global_import_price_list_subtitle: Upload a JSON file with prices – will be applied to all shops
import_price_list_modal_hint: Select a JSON file containing price list data. The file will be sent to the API for processing.
global_import_price_list_warning: Import will not overwrite currently effective prices. New prices will take effect from the specified date and will apply to ALL shops.
import_price_list_failed: Price list import failed. Please check the file format.
import_valid_from_hint: Prices from the imported file will take effect from this date. Must be a future date.
import_valid_from_required: Specify the date from which the price list should take effect.
import_valid_from_must_be_future: The effective date must be in the future.
invalid_file_format: Invalid file format. Please select a JSON file.
file_too_large: File is too large. Maximum size is 10MB.
file_read_error: Error reading file. Please try again.
invalid_json_file: Invalid JSON file. Please check the file contents.
filter_badge_hint: Click an active filter again to deselect it.
recipe_missing_raw_materials: Missing raw material costs — check ingredient prices (tile 2)
recipe_missing_labor: Missing labor costs — set time and rate (tile 4)
recipe_missing_overhead: Missing overhead costs — set forecast and pool (tile 5)
price_modal_hint: Set price for all shops at once
recipe_missing_general: Recipe requires completion — check all sections and save again
